CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, num UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE another_table (group_id UInt32, num UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupBitAnd(num) FROM another_table GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT t1.id, groupBitAnd(t1.num) FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.group_id GROUP BY t1.id;
CREATE TABLE multi_table (group_id UInt32, num UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupBitAnd(num) FROM (SELECT group_id, num FROM multi_table WHERE num > 5) GROUP BY group_id;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (id UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupBitAnd(num) FROM (SELECT if(id % 2 = 0, 0, 1) AS num FROM edge_cases);
SELECT groupBitAnd(num) FROM (SELECT NULLIF(id % 2, 0) AS num FROM edge_cases) WHERE num IS NOT NULL;
